response.overview: There's always a first in every box! Over 2 hours for adults only. Is it an exploration? Is it an experiment? Is it a career change? Whatever it may be they are here and the reality is, a new sexual experience awaits... In this volume, lovely Crystal Clear screams her way with orgasmic fervor. Robin Eve has some anal experimentation. Nautica Evans comes over for a hot quickie. Celina Cross hasn't had much experience at all sexually. This is her first time on camera. It's reality, a sexual documentary, orgasms that are real and a lot of fun... Strangers and an odd coupling can prove to be intense. A friendly older guy and sweet hot ladies can be an interesting combination. It's all here for ya'. Please enjoy! Peasce and love, Ed Powers
